description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND a Live AppleTV+ game is on the schedule
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to a Live AppleTV+ game in the Hero
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "<away_team>, <away_team_runs>, <home_team>, <home_team_runs>, Live, <half_inning>, Blacked Out, Watch On AppleTV+, <balls_strikes_count>, <number_of_outs>, <men_on_base>, press select to play, press up for the Main Menu, press down to browse more content."
